word: G5214 - ὑμνέω - hymnéō - hoom-neh'-o - Sing a hymn

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Sing a hymn
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to sing the praise of; sing hymns to
2. to sing a hymn, to sing
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5215; to hymn, that is, sing a religious ode; by implication to celebrate (God) in song: - sing an hymn (praise unto).
